highlights: New app icon and a refreshed look.
RefBoard files now show a preview thumbnail in File Explorer.
Notes: click to place your cursor, cleaner lists and checkboxes, and links show as clickable text.
Copy and paste now keeps your groups and pastes images individually.
Uses less memory with large image boards.
Fixed the save prompt after exporting, wheel scrolling on the home screen, and several zoom-related glitches.
